CONTENT.Career: Chovan made his Fortuna Liga debut for AS Trenčín against Žilina on 13 May 2016.On 21 July 2023, Chovan moved overseas for the first time in his career, signing a two-year contract with Panserraikos.On 19 June 2024, Chovan was announced as the new signing of Polish second-tier club Bruk-Bet Termalica Nieciecza.
CONTENT.Honours: TrenčínSlovak Super Liga: 2015–16Slovak Cup: 2015–16Slovan BratislavaSlovak Super Liga: 2021–22, 2022–23
CONTENT.External links: FK AS Trenčín official club profileAdrián Chovan at SoccerwayFutbalnet profile

SUMMARY: Adrián Chovan (born 8 October 1995) is a Slovak professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Polish club Bruk-Bet Termalica Nieciecza.
